dictionary_sections.definition: Scientific Progress is a source-backed TZPID registry entry anchored by the formal relation newName = \"{0}__processed_{1}{2}\" -f [IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension(. The entry records the named mathematical object as it appears in recovered source evidence and prepares it for the locked four-page production layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, Scientific Progress is not treated as an isolated label. It is read through the nearby source passage: lity as Core Design Constraint: view says that scientific theories are tools for organizing observations and making predictions, not descriptions of what really exists. From this perspective, whether extra dimensions "really exist" is not a meaningful question. What matters is whether the KK framework provides a useful way to organize your spectral data, make predictions, and design new... This keeps the dictionary explanation tied to the mathematical usage that produced the recovered formula.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The canonical relation supplies the primary production equation, while the support chain stamp = (NowUtc).ToString('yyyyMMddTHHmmssZ')\r; \n Q = C \\cdot V\n \ records adjacent mathematical consequences or compatible constraints. These relations can be used as equation support on the derivation page after author review.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: Lemma support is supplied by equation-universe evidence from D:\Conversation\3-Ready-For_Edit\by_eid\EID_0048\dialogue_clean.md. The candidate formula and its context are preserved so later Lean, Coq, Isabelle, Wolfram, or manual review can check the exact mathematical step.
dictionary_sections.technical_interpretation: Technically, Scientific Progress is represented by the displayed relation and the symbols occurring in that relation. The production packet keeps the equation, symbol key, Wolfram model, and derivation layer synchronized to the same evidence source.
dictionary_sections.equation_grounding: Equation grounding source: D:\Conversation\3-Ready-For_Edit\by_eid\EID_0048\dialogue_clean.md. The recovered source context provides the canonical equation and the nearby progression equations used in this preview.
dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: The interpretive role of Scientific Progress is to convert a previously blocked registry node into a reviewable mathematical entry with a stable formula, symbol explanations, derivation support, and proof-certificate scaffold.
dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus: Scientific Progress; equation-universe recovery; source-backed formula; registry repair candidate; TZPID production-section node.
dictionary_sections.encyclopedia_mathematica: Encyclopedia Mathematica: Scientific Progress should be indexed by its canonical relation, source formula symbols, and support equations. The entry remains evidence-backed because its mathematical content is traceable to the cited source path rather than invented filler prose.
